overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character walking through a rainy New Orleans-style French Quarter district. The character crosses cobblestone streets, walks under historic building awnings, passes pedestrians with umbrellas, and navigates intersections with vintage 1960s-era vehicles.

events.description: character steps off crosswalk onto cobblestone street surface
walking past parked vintage sedan on the left side

agents.ego_description: crossing the cobblestone street from the crosswalk toward the sidewalk

entered.detail: large stone building with tall windows and columns on the left side of the street
red brick building with green shutters and iron balconies on the right
zebra crossing painted on the cobblestone street
burgundy vintage 1960s sedan parked along the curb
A-frame sidewalk sign advertising girls and entertainment
black ornate cast iron street lamp on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character begins crossing a cobblestone street in a historic district, passing a parked vintage sedan. The scene features large stone commercial buildings on the left and brick buildings with iron balconies on the right, with wet pavement indicating recent rain.

events.description: entering covered sidewalk area under building overhangs and awnings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the covered sidewalk past storefronts and iron balconies

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction under the awning

entered.detail: overhanging roof structure providing shelter over the sidewalk
ornate cast iron railings on the second floor of the brick building
black metal trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks under covered sidewalks with building awnings providing shelter from the rain. The architecture features classic French Quarter style with iron balconies on the right and large stone buildings on the left. A pedestrian walks in the opposite direction under the cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with street traffic and pedestrians

events.description: green vintage station wagon drives past on the left side of the street
pedestrian with black umbrella passes in front of the camera view

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk as vehicles pass by and pedestrians share the walkway

notable_agents.action: green and white station wagon driving down the cobblestone street
man with black umbrella walking past the camera

entered.detail: lime green and white vintage station wagon driving on the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues along an open sidewalk with increased pedestrian activity. A green station wagon drives past on the left, and several pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the wet pavement. The covered awnings end, exposing the walkway to the rainy weather.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with stop sign and crosswalk

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection near the stop sign
turning right to follow the sidewalk on the opposite side of the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection at the stop sign and continuing along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella crossing the street ahead of the character

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign at the intersection
white painted crosswalk lines at the intersection
two-story residential houses with porches on the right side
mature oak trees with dense canopies lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses a street intersection marked by a stop sign. The environment transitions from commercial to residential, with houses and mature trees becoming visible. The character crosses the crosswalk and turns to follow the sidewalk on the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with historic homes and tree canopy

events.description: vintage cream-colored sedan drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the residential sidewalk with trees and houses on either side

notable_agents.action: vintage cream sedan driving down the residential street

entered.detail: red newspaper vending machine on the sidewalk
cream colored vintage sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along a residential sidewalk lined with mature trees and historic homes. A vintage car drives past on the street, and the wet pavement reflects the overcast sky. The scene maintains a quiet, rainy atmosphere in the residential district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy historic district that gradually transitions from a commercial center to a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins with the character crossing a wet cobblestone street past a parked vintage sedan, flanked by large stone buildings and ornate iron balconies. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts under the shelter of building awnings where they pass a pedestrian, before the walkway opens back up to the rain and increased activity as a green station wagon drives past. The camera then follows the character across a stop-sign intersection, where the dense commercial architecture gives way to mature trees and historic houses. Finally, the movement continues along a residential sidewalk under an overcast sky, passing another vintage car as the environment settles into a hushed, rainy atmosphere.
